name: Amiliana Tassle Lamp - 32 Inch Height - LIT4000 - Creme - Safavieh
description: Introducing the amiliana tassel lamp in a soft creme shade. This lamp adds an inviting touch to any living space. Crafted from cream glazed ceramic, its sleek design seamlessly blends with a variety of decor styles. The tassel detail enhances its visual appeal, ensuring it stands out as a sophisticated centerpiece. Perfect for any room from living spaces to bedrooms, the amiliana tassel lamp provides a warm and welcoming glow. Its neutral color complements any color palette, making it a versatile choice for your home. Illuminate your surroundings with style and subtle elegance, and let this unique piece light up your space with charm. Make the amiliana tassel lamp a part of your decor and transform any room into a haven of comfort and beauty.
